MaxLineLength:NotificationConditionTest.kt$NotificationConditionTest$assertFalse("Birthday 4 days away must not fire when threshold is 3", shouldNotify(daysUntil, notifyDaysBefore = 3))
MaxLineLength:NotificationConditionTest.kt$NotificationConditionTest$assertFalse("Event 2 days away must not fire when threshold is 3", shouldNotify(daysUntil, notifyDaysBefore = 3))
MaxLineLength:NotificationConditionTest.kt$NotificationConditionTest$assertFalse("Event 4 days away must not fire when threshold is 3", shouldNotify(daysUntil, notifyDaysBefore = 3))
MaxLineLength:NotificationConditionTest.kt$NotificationConditionTest$assertFalse("Tomorrow's event must not fire when notifyDaysBefore is 0", shouldNotify(daysUntil, notifyDaysBefore = 0))
MaxLineLength:NotificationConditionTest.kt$NotificationConditionTest$assertFalse("Wrapped birthday far in future must not fire for small threshold", shouldNotify(daysUntil, notifyDaysBefore = 3))
MaxLineLength:NotificationConditionTest.kt$NotificationConditionTest$assertTrue("Birthday exactly 3 days away must trigger advance notice", shouldNotify(daysUntil, notifyDaysBefore = 3))
MaxLineLength:NotificationConditionTest.kt$NotificationConditionTest$assertTrue("Event exactly 3 days away must trigger advance notice", shouldNotify(daysUntil, notifyDaysBefore = 3))
